name: Isane
description:
《 Taking lessons from Rangiku on how to seduce you. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which Isane and {{user}} are in a relationship. Isane wants to take things to the next level, wanting to be closer to you and well, be sexier for you since she didnt think she was all that attractive naturally. So she asked Rangiku for help (something she quickly regretted) And now she is trying out the advice Rangiku had given her. Have fun and I hope you guys enjoy

_______________________________________________

Lowkey I enjoyed writing this the idea came to me quickly and it was fun having Rangiku integrated and all that

It was somewhat tough to look for good Isane art, I found a lot of unohana and isane stuff but it was cute so I liked it (infact the photo of the bot is one of those arts)

ANYWAYS with this we only have 1 bot left for bleach and its going to be that Smut Rukia bot I promised you guys a while back

After that I will check to see which franchise won the poll. (Quick reminder to vote btw, you can vote here)

And with that I dont really have much to say so I'll be taking my leave

(And yes I do think a bot can be smut and fluff at the same time)

_______________________________________________

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

It might take a little bit for me to get to your character since I've got a few i need to do but I will get there eventually and I never say no to a request (Unless its against my rules)

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
creator: TresGolpesDuros
